summary: Phase 1 — TestimonialCard.astro: Added optional `photo?: string` and `photoAlt?: string` props. When `photo` is provided, renders a circular (44×44px, border-radius 50%, object-fit cover, accent-color border); falls back to gradient initials avatar when omitted.

Phase 2 — Testimonials.astro: Replaced static `.testimonials-grid` with a single-slide carousel. Implemented `.carousel-wrapper` (overflow hidden) + `.carousel-track` (display flex, translateX animation) + `.carousel-slide` (flex 0 0 100%). Added Prev/Next SVG icon buttons and dot indicators with active gold state. Inline vanilla JS implements goTo(index) with wrap-around, dot click, touch/swipe (≥50px threshold), and prefers-reduced-motion guard.
Phase 3 — Photo assets: Three WebP headshots added to `public/testimonials/` (marco-rossi.webp, sarah-kim.webp, james-walsh.webp). Testimonials data array updated with photo/photoAlt fields.
Build Validation: `npm run build` completed in ~3s with 7 pages built and zero errors. `npx astro check` reported 0 errors, 0 warnings (10 pre-existing hints only, not related to this feature).

validation.build: PASSED — 7 page(s) built in 3.03s, zero errors
